title: stelis nubis
intro: Stelis nubis, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central America. The medicinal properties of Stelis nubis include its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis nubis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
